name: Grated Carrot & Date Salad with Gorgonzola
recipeIngredient: Dandelion, arugula or young lettuce leaves for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mash and whisk the cheese with olive oil, vinegar, and pepper until you have a thick dressing.
2. Peel the carrots and grate them on the large holes of a hand-held grater to make 1 cup grated carrot pieces.
3. Chop the dates into pieces about the size of corn kernels.
4. Add the dressing to the grated carrots and chopped dates, and stir until all ingredients are well coated.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl or individual salad plates.
6. Garnish with dandelion, arugula, or lettuce.
Serves 6 to 8.
The San Francisco Chronicle, November 15, 1995
